connectedhomeip minimal header seed staged for hidden-seam Arduino compile smoke.

Source repository:
- https://github.com/project-chip/connectedhomeip

Requested ref:
- master

Resolved commit:
- 337f8f54b4f0813681664e5b179dc3e16fdd14a0

Imported scope:
- LICENSE
- README.md
- src/lib/core/CHIPVendorIdentifiers.hpp
- src/lib/core/GroupId.h
- src/lib/core/PasscodeId.h
- src/lib/core/NodeId.h

Scope note:
- this is a minimal staged header seed, not a full connectedhomeip scaffold
- the hidden Matter seam can use these headers for compile smoke and probe
  validation
- current repo runtime still does not claim a compileable or linkable Matter
  target
